17.24: Ya Uba, ina so wadanda ka ba ni, su ma su kasance tare da ni inda nake, domin su dubi daukakata da ka yi mani. Domin ka kaunace ni tun kafin halittar duniya.
17.25: Ya Uba mai adalci, duniya kam, ba ta sanka ba, amma ni na sanka; kuma wadannan sun sani kai ne ka aiko ni.
17.26: Na sanar masu da sunanka, zan kuma sanar da shi domin kaunar da ka yi mani ta kasance a cikinsu, ni kuma in kasance a cikinsu,

18.1: ¶ Bayan Yesu ya fadi wadannan maganganu, ya fita shi da almajiransa zuwa daya barayin kwarin Kidiron, inda wani lambu ya ke, ya kuma shiga da almajiransa.
18.2: Yahuza ma wanda zai bashe shi ya san wurin, domin Yesu ya saba zuwa wurin da almajiransa.
18.3: Yahuza kuwa, bayan ya dauko kungiyar soja daga manyan firistoci, da Farisawa, da 'yan majalisa, suka zo wurin, rike da fitilu, da cociloli, da makamai.
18.4: Sai Yesu, da ya san duk abinda ke faruwa da shi, yayiwo gaba, yace masu, ''Wa kuke nema''
18.5: Suka amsa masa su ka ce, ''Yesu Banazare'' Yesu yace masu, Ni ne'' Yahuza kuma, wanda ya bashe shi, yana tsaye tare da sojojin.
18.6: Sa'adda ya ce masu, ''Ni ne'', suka koma da baya, suka fadi a kasa.
18.7: Ya sake tambayarsu kuma, ''Wa ku ke nema?'' su ka ce, ''Yesu Banazare.''
18.8: Yesu ya amsa, ''Ai, na gaya maku cewa, Ni ne. In kuwa ni ku ke nema, ku bar wadannan su tafi abinsu;''
18.9: Wannan kuwa domin maganar daya fada ta cika, ''Daga cikin wadanda ka ba ni, ko daya bai bace mani ba.''
18.10: Saminu Bitrus kuwa, da ya ke yana da takobi, ya zaro ya kai wa bawan babban firist sara, ya dauke masa kunnensa na dama, sunan bawan Malkus ne.
18.11: Yesu ya ce wa Bitrus, ''Mai da takobin ka kubenta. Ba zan sha kokon da Uba ya ba ni ba.'?
18.12: Sai sojojin da hafsan, da 'yan majalisar Yahudawa, suka kama Yesu, suka daure shi.
18.13: Da fari suka tafi da shi wurin Hanana, don shi surukin Kayafa ne, wanda ya ke shi ne babban firist a shekaran nan.
18.14: Kayafa kuma shi ne ya ba Yahudawa shawara, cewa ya fiye masu mutum daya ya mutu domin mutane.
18.15: Saminu bitrus ya bi bayan Yesu, haka kuma wani almajirin yayi. Almajirin nan kuwa sananne ne ga babban firist, sai ya shiga har farfajiyar babban firist din tara da Yesu;
18.16: Amma bitrus kuwa ya tsaya a bakin kofa daga waje. Sai daya almajirin da ya ke sananne ga babban firist ya fita, yayi magana da macen da ta ke tsaron kofar, sa'an nan ya shigo da Bitrus.
18.17: Sai yarinyar mai tsaron kofar ta ce wa Bitrus, ''kai ma ba kana cikin almajiran mutumin nan ba?'' Yace ''bani ba.''
18.18: To, barorin da dogaran Haikali suna tsaye a wurin, sun kuwa hura wutar gawayi, suna jin dumi, gama ana sanyi. Bitrus ma yana tsaye tare da su yana jin dumin.
18.19: babban firist ya tambayi Yesu game da almajiransa da koyarwarsa kuma.
18.20: Yesu ya amsa masa, Ai, na yi wa duniya magana a bayyane. Na kuma sha koyarwa a majami'u da Haikali in da Yahudawa duka sukan taru. Ban fadi komai a boye ba.
18.21: Don me kake tambaya ta? Ka tambayi wadanda suka saurare ni a kan abinda na fada, ai, sun san abinda na fada.
18.22: Sa'adda Yesu ya fadi wannan, wani daga cikin 'yan majalisar da ke tsaye a wurin ya nushi Yesu, yace, ''Kana amsa wa babban firist haka.''
18.23: Yesu ya amsa masa yace, ''Idan na fadi mugun abu to, ka bada shaida kan hakan. In kuwa dai dai na fada, to, dan me za ka nushe ni?''
18.24: Sai Hanana ya aika daYesu a daure wurin Kayafa, babban firist.
18.25: To Saminu Bitrus yana tsaye yana jin dumin. Mutanen kuwa suka ce masa, ''Anya kai ma ba cikin almajiransa ka ke ba?'' Sai yayi musu yace, ''A'a, ba na ciki.''
18.26: Sai wani daga cikin bayin babban firist, wato dan'uwan wanda Bitrus ya fillewa kunne, yace, ''Ashe, ban gan ka tare da shi a lambun ba?
18.27: Bitrus ya sake yin musu, nan da nan kuwa zakara yayi cara.
18.28: Daga wurin Kayafa kuma suka kai Yesu fadar Gwamna. Da asuba ne kuwa, su kansu ba su shiga fadar Gwamnan ba, wai don kada su kazantu su kasa cin jibin Ketarewa.
18.29: Sai bilatus fa ya fita zuwa wurinsu, yace, 'Wane zargi ku ke kawowa akan mutumin nan?'
18.30: ''Sai suka amsa suka ce, ''idan da mutumin nan bai yi mugun abu ba, me zai sa mu yi kararsa a wurin ka''
18.31: bilatus yace masu, ''Ku tafi da shi da kan ku mana, ku hukunta shi bisa ga shari'arku!'' Sai Yahudawa su kace masa, ''Ai, ba mu da ikon zartar da hukuncin kisa akan kowa.''
18.32: Sun fadi Wannan ne don a cika maganar da Yesu yayi, wadda ta kwatanta irin mutuwar da zai yi.
18.33: Sai bilatus ya sake shiga cikin fadar Gwamnan, ya kira Yesu ya ce masa, ''kai sarkin Yahudawa ne?''
18.34: Yesu ya amsa, '' wannan fadarka ce, ko kuwa wadansu ne suka ce da ni haka a wurinka?''
18.35: Bilatus ya amsa “Ni ba Bayahude bane, ko kuwa?'' Ai, jama'arka ne da manyan firistoci suka bashe ka gareni. ''Me ka yi?''
18.36: Yesu ya amsa, ''Mulkina ba na duniya nan ba ne. Da mulkina na duniyan nan ne da barorina za su yi yaki kada a bashe ni ga Yahudawa. To, mulkina ba daga nan ya ke ba.''
18.37: Sai Bilatus yace masa, ''Wato ashe, sarki ne kai?'' Yesu ya amsa, ''Yadda ka fada, ni sarki ne. Domin wannan dalili aka haife ni, domin kuma wannan dalili na zo cikin duniya, don in bada shaida game da gaskiya. Kowane mai kaunar gaskiya kuma yakan saurari muryata.''
18.38: Bilatus yace masa, ''Menene gaskiya?'' Bayan da ya fadi haka, ya sake fitowa wurin Yahudawa, yace masu, ''Ni kam, ban sami mutumin nan da wani laifi ba.
18.39: Amma dai kuna da wata al'ada, in Idin Ketarewa ya yi, na kan sakar maku mutum daya. To, kuna so in sakar maku sarkin Yahudawa?''
18.40: Sai suka sake daukar kururuwa suna cewa, ''A; a, ba wannan mutum ba, sai dai Barabbas.'' Barabbas din nan kuwa dan fashi ne.

19.1: ¶ Sai Bilatus yayi wa Yesu bulala.
19.2: Sojojin kuwa suka saka rawanin kaya. Suka kuwa dora wa Yesu a kai suka sa mashi kaya irin na saurata.
19.3: Suka zo wurin sa sukace, “Ranka ya dade, sarkin Yahudawa! sai suka nushe shi.
19.4: Sai Bilatus ya sake fita waje yace masu, “Dubi, zan kawo maku mutumin domin ku sani ban same shi da wani laifi ba”,
19.5: Yesu kuwa ya fito, da rawanin kaya da kaya irin na sarauta. Sai Bilatus yace “Ga mutumin nan”.
19.6: Da manyan firistocin tare da yan majalisar suka ga Yesu, sai suka yi ta ihu suna cewa “A gicciye shi, A gicciye shi” Sai Bilatus yace masu, “ku dauke shi ku gicciye shi, ni kam ban same shi da wani laifi ba”.
19.7: Sai Yahudawan sukace mashi, “Ai muna da shari'a, kuma bisa ga shari'ar ya cancanci mutuwa domin ya mai da kansa Dan Allah”.
19.8: Da Bilatus ya ji wannan zance sai ya tsorata kwarai.
19.9: Sai ya sake shiga fadar Gwamna, yace wa Yesu, “Daga ina ka fito?” amma Yesu bai amsa mashi ba.
19.10: Sai Bilatus yace masa “Ba zaka yi mani magana ba? Baka san ina da iko in sake ka ba, kuma in gicciye ka?
19.11: Yesu ya amsa masa, “Ai ba ka da iko a kaina sai dai in an baka daga sama, Saboda haka, wanda ya mika ni a gare ka shine mafi zunubi”.
19.12: Da jin haka, sai Bilatus yayi kokari a sake shi, amma sai Yahudawa suka tada murya sukace, “In ka saki mutumin nan, kai ba abokin Kaisar bane, duk wanda ya maida kansa sarki, ya sabawa Kaisar”.
19.13: Da Bilatus ya ji irin maganganunsu sai ya fito da Yesu waje ya kuma zauna akan kujeransa a inda ake kira “Dakalin shari'a,” a Yahudanci kuma, “Gabbata.”
19.14: To a ran nan ana shirye shiryen idin ketarewa, da misalin sa'a ta shidda kenan, wato tsakar rana, Bilatus yace wa Yahudawan “Ga sarkin ku!”
19.15: Su kuwa suka yi ihu, a tafi da shi, a tafi da shi, a gicciye shi, Bilatus yace masu “In gicciye sarkin ku? Sai manyan firistocin sukace “Ba mu da wani sarki sai Kaisar”.
19.16: Sai Bilatus ya mika Yesu domin su gicciye shi.
19.17: Sai suka tafi da Yesu, ya fito yana dauke da gicciyen zuwa wurin da ake kira “Wurin kwalluwa” da Yahudanci kuma “Golgota”.
19.18: Suka gicciye Yesu a wurin, tare da wasu mutum biyu, daya a kowane gefe, Yesu kuwa na tsikiya.
19.19: Bilatus kuwa ya rubuta wata alama a kan gicciyen, “YESU BANAZARE, SARKIN YAHUDAWA”.
19.20: Yahudawa da yawa kuwa suka karanta wannan alama domin wurin da aka gicciye Yesu yana kusa da Birnin. Alamar kuwa an rubuta ta da Yahudanci, da Romanci, da Helenanci.
19.21: Sai manyan firistocin yahudawa sukace wa Bilatus, kada ka rubuta sarkin Yahudawa, amma kace, 'wannan yace “Ni ne sarkin Yahudawa”'.
19.22: Bilatus kuwa ya amsa, “Abinda na rubuta na rubuta kenan.”
19.23: Bayan da sojojin suka gicciye Yesu, sai suka yayyaga rigarsa kashi hudu, kowane soja da nasa, kashin, sai kuma alkyabbar. Alkyabbar kuwa bata da dinki an saka tane daga sama har kasa.
19.24: Sai sukace wa junansu, “Kada mu yaga alkyabbar, amma kuzo mu jefa kuri'a a kan ta mu gani ko wanene zai dauke ta, anyi haka ne domin a cika nassi cewa “Sun raba rigata a tsakaninsu, sun kuwa jefa kuri'a domin alkyabbata.
19.25: Sojojin suka yi wadannan abubuwa. Uwar Yesu, da 'yar'uwarta, da Maryamu matar Kilofas, da kuma Maryamu Magadaliya. Wadannan mataye suna tsaye kusa da gicciyen Yesu.
19.26: Da Yesu ya ga mahaifiyarsa da almajirin nan da yake kauna tsaye kusa da juna, yace, “Mace, dubi, dan ki!”
19.27: Sai yace wa almajirin, “Dubi, mahaifiyarka!” Daga wannan sa'a almajirin ya dauke ta zuwa gidansa.
19.28: Bayan wannan Yesu, saboda ya san yanzu komai ya kammala, domin a cika nassin, sai yace “Ina jin kishi.
19.29: A gefensu kuma akwai gora cike da ruwan inabi mai tsami, sai suka tsoma soso a cikin ruwan inabin mai tsami suka daura a wata sanda sai suka mika masa a baki.
19.30: Da Yesu ya tsotsi ruwan tsamin, sai yace “An gama” Sai ya sunkuyar da kansa ya kuwa saki ruhunsa.
19.31: Sai Yahudawan, domin ranar shirye shirye ne, domin kada a bar jikunansu akan gicciye har ranar asabacin (domin asabacin rana ce mai muhimmanci), suka roki Bilatus ya kakkarye kafafunsu kuma ya saukar da su.
19.32: Sai sojojin suka zo suka karya kafafun mutum na farko da kuma mutum na biyun wadanda aka gicciye tare da Yesu.
19.33: Da suka iso kan Yesu sai suka tarar ya riga ya mutu, sai basu kuwa karya kafafunsa ba.
19.34: Duk da haka daya daga cikin sojojin ya soki kuibin shi da mashi, nan da nan sai jini da ruwa suka fito.
19.35: Wanda ya ga wannan, shi ya zama shaida, shaidarsa kuwa gaskiya ce. Ya sani cewa abinda ya fada gaskiya ne saboda ku ma ku gaskata.
19.36: Wadannan sun faru ne domin a cika nassi, “Babu ko daya daga cikin kasusuwansa da za'a karya”.
19.37: Kuma wani nassin yace, “Zasu dube shi wanda suka soka.”
19.38: Bayan wadannan abubuwa, Yusufu mutumin Arimatiya, wanda yake almajirin Yesu ne (amma a boye saboda tsoron Yahudawa) ya roki Bilatus izini domin ya dauke jikin Yesu. Bilatus kuwa ya bashi izini, sai Yusufu yazo ya dauki jikin.
19.39: Nikodimu ma ya zo, wanda da farko ya zo wurin Yesu da daddare, ya kawo hadin man kamshi na mur da al'ul wajen nauyin awo dari.
19.40: Sai suka dauki jikin Yesu suka sa shi a likkafanin lillin tare da kayan kamshin nan, domin jana'iza bisa ga al'adar Yahudawa.
19.41: To a wurin da aka gicciye shi kuwa akwai wani lambu, a cikin lambun kuma akwai sabon kabari wanda ba'a taba sa kowa ba.
19.42: Da yake ranar shirye shirye ce ta Yahudawa, kabarin kuwa na kusa, sai suka sa Yesu a ciki.

20.1: ¶ To da sassafe ranar farko ta mako, da sauran duhu, Maryamu Magadaliya ta zo kabarin, ta tarar an kawar da dutsen daga kabarin.
20.2: Sai ta ruga da gudu zuwa wurin Saminu Bitrus tare da almajirin nan da Yesu ke kauna, tace masu, “Sun dauke Ubangiji daga kabarin, bamu kuwa san inda aka sa shi ba.”
20.3: Sai Bitrus tare da almajirin nan suka fita, kuma suka tafi kabarin,
20.4: dukansu suka ruga da gudu tare, amma daya almajirin ya riga Bitrus isowa kabarin,
20.5: Sai ya sunkuya ya leka ciki, ya ga likkafanin lillin a wurin, amma fa bai shiga ciki ba.
20.6: Sai Saminu Bitrus ya iso daga bayansa sai ya shiga kabarin, ya tarar da likkafanin lillin a ajiye.
20.7: sai fallen kuma da yake kansa. Ba'a ajiye tare da likkafanin ba amma aka linkeshi aka ajiye shi daban.
20.8: Sai almajirin nan da ya riga isa kabarin shi ma ya shiga ya gani, sai ya ba da gaskiya.
20.9: Har ya zuwa wannan lokacin basu san nassin daya ce zai tashi daga matattu ba.
20.10: Sai almajiran suka sake komawa gida kuma.
20.11: Amma Maryamu tana tsaye a bakin kabarin tana kuka. Yayin da take kuka, sai ta sunkuya ta leka cikin kabarin.
20.12: Sai ta ga mala'iku guda biyu cikin fararen kaya zaune, daya ta wurin kai daya kuma ta wurin kafafu inda aka kwantar da Yesu.
20.13: Sukace mata, “Uwargida don me kike kuka? Sai tace masu, “Domin sun dauke Ubangijina, ban kuwa san inda suka ajiye shi ba.
20.14: Bayan ta fadi haka, ta juya sai ta ga Yesu tsaye a wurin. Amma bata san cewa Yesu bane,
20.15: Yesu yace mata, “Uwargida, me yasa kike kuka? Wa kuma kike nema? Domin tana zaton shine mai kula da lambun, sai tace masa, “Maigida in kaine ka dauke shi, gaya mani inda ka sa shi, ni kuwa in dauke shi.”
20.16: Yesu yace mata, “Maryamu”. Sai ta juya, tace masa da Armaniyanci “Rabboni!” wato mallam.
20.17: Yesu yace mata, kada ki taba ni, domin har yanzu ban hau wurin Uba ba tukuna, amma kije wurin 'yan'uwana kice masu, zan je wurin Ubana da Ubanku, Allahna da kuma Allahnku”.
20.18: Maryamu Magadaliya ta je tace wa almajiran, “Na ga Ubangiji” Ta kuma ce ya fada mata wadannan abubuwa.
20.19: Da yamma a wannan rana, a rana ta farko ta mako, almajiran suna kulle a daki saboda tsoron Yahudawa, Yesu yazo ya tsaya a tsakaninsu, yace “Salama Agareku”.
20.20: Bayan ya fadi haka, sai ya nuna masu hannuwansa da kuibinsa. Da almajiran suka ga Ubangiji, sai suka yi farin ciki.
20.21: Yesu ya sake ce masu, “salama agareku. “Kamar yadda Uba ya aiko ni, haka Ni ma na aike ku”.
20.22: Da Yesu ya fadi haka, sai ya hura masu lumfashinsa, yace masu, “Ku karbi Ruhu Mai Tsarki.
20.23: Duk wanda kuka gafarta wa zunubai, an gafarta masa; kowa kuka rike zunubansa, an rikesu.”
20.24: Toma, daya daga cikin sha biyun, wanda ake kira Dan Tagwai, baya tare dasu lokacin da Yesu ya bayyana.
20.25: Sauran almajiran sukace masa “Mun ga Ubangiji”. Sai yace masu, “In ban ga gurbin kusoshi a hannuwansa ba, in sa yatsana a gurbin kusoshin ba, in kuma sa hannuna cikin kuibinsa ba, ba zan bada gaskiya ba.
20.26: Bayan kwana takwas har wa yau almajiran na cikin gida, Toma ma na tare dasu, kofofin suna kulle, sai ga Yesu a tsakaninsu yace, “Salama agareku”.
20.27: Sa'an nan yace wa Toma, “Iso nan da yatsanka, dubi hannuwana. Miko hannunka kuma kasa a kuibina, kada ka zama marar bada gaskiya, sai dai, mai bada gaskiya”.
20.28: Toma ya amsa yace “Ya Ubangijina da Allahna!”
20.29: Yesu yace masa, “Wato saboda ka gan ni, ka bada gaskiya? Albarka ta tabbata ga wadanda basu gani ba, amma kuwa sun bada gaskiya.
20.30: Yesu yayi wadansu alamu da yawa dabam dabam a gaban almajiransa, wadanda ba'a rubuta a littafin nan ba.
20.31: Amma an rubuta wadannan ne, domin ku bada gaskiya Yesu shine Almasihu, Dan Allah, ta wurin gaskatawa kuma ku sami rai cikin sunansa.

21.1: ¶ Bayan wadannan abubuwa, Yesu ya sake bayyana kansa ga almajiran a bakin tekun Tibariya. Ga yadda ya bayyana kansa:
21.2: Saminu Bitrus na tare da Toma wanda ake kira Dan Tagwai, da Natana'ilu daga Kana ta kasar Galili, da 'ya'yan nan na Zabadi, da kuma wadansu almajiran Yesu biyu.
21.3: Saminu Bitrus yace masu, “Zani su.” sukace masa “Mu ma za mu je tare da kai.” Sai suka fita suka shiga jirgi, amma a daren nan basu kama komai ba.
21.4: To, gari na wayewa, sai ga Yesu tsaye a bakin gaci, amma almajiran basu gane cewa Yesu bane.
21.5: Sai Yesu yace masu, “Samari, kuna da wani abinda za a ci?” Suka amsa masa sukace “A'a”.
21.6: Yace masu, “Ku jefa taru dama da jirgin zaku samu wasu.” Suka jefa tarunsu har suka kasa jawo shi don yawan kifin.
21.7: Sai almajirin nan da Yesu yake kauna yace wa Bitrus, “Ubangiji ne fa!” Da Saminu Bitrus yaji, Ashe, Ubangiji ne, yayi damara da taguwarsa, (don a tube yake), ya fada a tekun.
21.8: Sauran almajiran kuwa suka zo a cikin karamin jirgi, (domin basu da nisa da kasa, kamar kamu dari biyu zuwa sama), janye da tarun cike da kifi.
21.9: Da isowarsu gaci, sai suka ga garwashin wuta a wurin da kifi akai, da kuma gurasa.
21.10: Yesu ya ce masu “Ku kawo wandansu daga cikin kifin da kuka kama yanzu”.
21.11: Sai Saminu Bitrus ya hau, ya jawo tarun gaci, cike da manyan kifaye dari da hamsin da uku (153). Amma duk da yawansu, tarun bai tsage ba.
21.12: Yesu yace masu, “Ku zo ku karya kumallo”. Daga cikin almajiran kuwa babu wanda yayi karfin halin tambayarsa “Ko shi wanene?” Domin sunsani Ubangiji ne.
21.13: Yesu zo ya dauki gurasar ya ba su, haka kuma kifin.
21.14: Wannan shine karo na uku da Yesu ya bayyana ga almajiransa bayan tashinsa daga matattu.
21.15: Da suka karya kumallon, Yesu yace wa Saminu Bitrus, “Bitrus dan Yahaya, kana kaunata fiye da wadannan?” Bitrus yace masa “I ya Ubangiji, ka sani ina kaunarka” Yesu yace masa “Ka ciyar da 'ya'yan tumakina”.
21.16: Ya sake fada masa karo na biyu, “Saminu Dan Yahaya, kana kaunata?” Bitrus Yace masa “I ya Ubangiji, ka sani ina kaunarka”. Yesu yace masa, “Ka lura da Tumakina”.
21.17: Ya sake fada masa, karo na uku, “Bitrus Dan Yahaya, kana kaunata? Sai Bitrus bai ji dadi ba domin Yesu ya fada masa karo na uku, “Kana kaunata” Yace masa, “Ubangiji ka san komai duka, ka sani ina kaunarka.” Yesu yace masa “Ka ciyar da tumaki na.
21.18: Hakika, hakika, Ina gaya maka, lokacin da kake kuruciyarka, kakan yi wa kanka damara, ka tafi inda ka ga dama. amma in ka tsufa, zaka mike hannuwanka wani yayi maka damara, ya kai ka inda baka nufa ba.”
21.19: To Yesu ya fadi haka ne domin ya nuna irin mutuwar da Bitrus zai yi ga daukakar Allah. Bayan ya fadi haka, sai yace wa Bitrus, ka biyo ni.
21.20: Bitrus ya juya sai ya ga almajirin da Yesu yake kauna yana biye dasu; wanda ya jingina a kirgin Yesu lokacin cin jibin nan da yace “Ya Ubangiji, wanene zai bashe ka?”
21.21: Da Bitrus ya gan shi, yace wa Yesu “Ya Ubangiji, Me mutumin nan zai yi?”
21.22: Yesu yace masa, “Idan ina so ya zauna har in dawo ina ruwanka? Ka biyo ni.”
21.23: Wannan zance ya yadu cikin 'yan'uwa cewa, wannan almajirin ba zai mutu ba. Alhali Yesu bai cewa Bitrus, wannan almajirin ba zai mutu ba, Amma “Idan ina so ya zauna har in dawo ina ruwanka?”
21.24: Wannan shine almajirin da yake shaida wadannan abubuwa, wanda ya rubuta su, kuma mun tabbata shaidarsa gaskiya ne.
21.25: Akwai kuma sauran abubuwa da yawa wanda Yesu yayi. Idan da an rubuta kowannensu daya bayan daya, ina gaya maku, ko duniya bazata iya daukar litattafan da za a rubuta ba.
